Name: Miraval Resort & Spa
Tagline: Miraval is an inclusive destination resort and spa with innovative programs and wellness specialists. Browse our resorts in Texas, Arizona, and Massachusetts.
About: At Miraval Resorts & Spas, our mission of creating life in balance through mindfulness has been guiding individuals to elevate their wellbeing for three decades. We offer innovative experiences and intentional journeys for guests to consciously explore the connection of body, mind, and spirit.
Philosophy: Our Authentic Circle program to show our appreciation for our most loyal guests. Membership is automatic for guests after their 10th night within a calendar year.
Outcomes: The food selection here is vast, and—like all our resorts— your portions are as large or small as you choose. Miraval Austin is home to the biodynamic Cypress Creek Farm, the brand’s largest, which supplies our kitchens with fresh ingredients year-round, including eggs, produce, and honey.
Admissions: To join Miraval Resort & Spa, guests can book their stay directly through the website or by calling the resort. There are no tests or auditions required, and availability may vary based on the season.
Quote: Embrace mindful moments and discover the harmonious connection of body, mind, and spirit for a balanced life.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Miraval Resort & Spa employs wellness experts with degrees from elite institutions like Stanford and Harvard, specializing in mindfulness, nutrition, and holistic health practices. Their staff includes certified yoga instructors and licensed therapists.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Miraval offers personalized wellness programs, including mindfulness workshops and stress management counseling, to enhance guests' emotional and physical health. Their community-building activities foster a supportive environment for holistic growth.
Performance.Academic Integration: Miraval's curriculum focuses on experiential learning through workshops in mindfulness and sustainable living, rather than traditional academic subjects. Guests engage in signature programs like the Equine Experience for personal development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: While Miraval is not an academic institution, its wellness programs have been recognized for enhancing personal growth and life skills, indirectly supporting career advancement. Notable alumni have pursued successful careers in wellness and mindfulness coaching.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The resort boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including a full-service spa, yoga and fitness studios, and a meditation labyrinth. Guests enjoy access to serene outdoor spaces and a biodynamic farm for immersive experiences.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Miraval maintains high standards through guest feedback and continuous improvement processes, ensuring quality experiences. They are not affiliated with NYSAIS or ERB but emphasize guest satisfaction and program effectiveness.
